name: viking_bronisze_e10_gray_demo_with_excluded_zones
description: E10 gray demo baseline with the UI legend zone and accepted right-side exclusion zone applied. Templates are extracted fresh from the PDF legend during regression.
scope: This golden intentionally excludes the legend area selected in the UI.
This golden also excludes the accepted right-side manual zone from the demo run.
Regression must extract E10 templates fresh from the PDF legend zone before detection.
The static fixture PNGs remain only as reference images for extraction hash/geometry tests.
knownLimitations: Changing the UI legend/exclusion zones changes the total count by design.
Do not compare this 119-box baseline to the older full-page 139-box baseline without accounting for excluded zones.
